title: Custom NPCs
description:
Custom NPCs is a mod used to liven up words or to create your own adventure.

It features tools to create NPCs and change their health/strenght/weapons/skin and AI.
body:
![cnpc_image](https://i.imgur.com/kUbPW7K.png)

Custom NPCs is a mod used to liven up words or to create your own adventure.

It features tools to create NPCs and change their health/strenght/weapons/skin and AI.

Information:
- [Starting info](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs)
- [Installation Guide](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/installation/)
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/faq/)
- [Changelog](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/changelog)
- [Items](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/items)
- [Dialog Setup](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/dialog)
- [Factions Setup](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/factions)
- [Roles](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/roles/)
- [Jobs](https://www.kodevelopment.nl/minecraft/customnpcs/jobs)
